name: ᚲ Kenaz
flowText: Kenaz is the artisan’s flame — light that reveals the pattern in matter.

overview.label: Tarot
overview.value: XIX The Sun · XVI The Tower

items.label: Tarot
items.value: XIX The Sun · XVI The Tower

related.name: Citrine
related.teaser: Solar fire is the sovereign flame—the courage to act and become.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: Sol
related.teaser: Solar plexus is the furnace of power — fire of will, anger purified into radiance.

related.name: ♂ Mars
related.teaser: Mars is the blade of fire — spear of will, tower’s flame, the storm of courage.

related.name: Garnet
related.teaser: Solar fire is the sovereign flame—the courage to act and become.

related.name: Tezcatlipoca
related.teaser: Solar plexus is the furnace of power — fire of will, anger purified into radiance.

related.name: Sunna
related.teaser: Solar plexus is the furnace of power — fire of will, anger purified into radiance.

related.name: Sunstone
related.teaser: Solar fire is the sovereign flame—the courage to act and become.

related.name: ☉ Sun
related.teaser: The Sun is the eternal lamp — source of clarity, fire of spirit, nobility of heart.

related.name: ♌ Leo
related.teaser: Leo is the lion’s flame — crown of fire, creative will, sovereign radiance.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: XIX. The Sun
related.teaser: The Sun is pure illumination — radiant joy and vital force shining clarity into all things.
